title: Plant in a Box - Sansevieria Laurentii - Easy houseplant - Lady's Tongue - Pot 17cm - Height 60-70cm
features: A robust and stylish Sansevieria laurentii with distinctive sword-shaped leaves. This air-purifying houseplant is practically indestructible.
Snake plant (Sansevieria): grows in bright or low light: ideally bright with sun/partial shade. Little water, always allow to dry: winter 6–8 weeks dry: spring/summer every 2 weeks.
Sansevieria Laurentii in larger pot size gives a bold clean look. Ideal for living room, office or hallway. Very low-maintenance, air-purifying and beautiful in anthracite or terracotta pots.
Carefully packed in a sturdy shipping box specially designed for plants. This way, your order is protected from potential damage during transport.
The plant has a height of 60-70cm upon delivery, measured including the nursery pot. The plant is supplied in a nursery pot with a diameter of 17cm.
description: Sansevieria's are originally from Africa and are one of the easiest houseplants to care for. The plant is also called 'Snake Plant'. With its beautiful upward thickened leaves, the Sansevieria is a true masterpiece to see. Characterised by its green and yellow striped leaves, it is known for its stylish appearance and easy maintenance. It is an ideal houseplant for forgetful waterers or people without 'green fingers'. The Sansevieria Laurentii is known for its air-purifying abilities, making it the ideal plant to purify the air in your home or office. It filters harmful substances from the air and helps to reduce headaches, allergies and other health problems associated with poor air quality. Care Sansevierias are very easy plants to care for. It can grow almost anywhere, whether in a bright or darker location. The most ideal location is a bright spot with sun to semi-shade. The plant requires little water. The 'only way' to kill a Sansevieria is to give the plant too much water. It is important that all soil has dried thoroughly before you water the plant again, otherwise there is a risk of root rot. During the winter, the plant can go without water for 6 to 8 weeks. During the growing season (in spring and summer) watering once every 2 weeks is sufficient. The plant performs well in both a dark and light location. Size The plant has a height of 60-70cm upon delivery, measured including the nursery pot. The plant is supplied in a nursery pot with a diameter of 17cm.
